rationale: The cited paper is used in the citing paper's core theoretical setup rather than as a passing reference. In the theory section, the authors explicitly rely on Ghosh and John (2005) as empirical support for governance value analysis and for the claim that alignment between governance and organizational choices affects performance. They also use it in positioning their contribution, stating they extend prior governance-value work to multichannel B2B sales systems and financial outcomes.
relation_description: The citing paper extends the governance value analysis line represented by Ghosh and John (2005) into multichannel sales system design. It keeps the alignment logic but tests it with new design dimensions (direct vs indirect channel usage) and governance mechanisms in a different channel context.
